reason: WP01 ready for review: merge data-loss regression pinned (T001), resume idempotent (T002), index refresh (T003), untracked tolerance (T004), dependent-WP scheduler (T005), lane DB isolation (T006). Tests in tests/integration/ and tests/unit/lanes/ green.

review.reference: Review passed: 6/6 subtasks verified. Tests green (34 integration in merge/post_merge/lane filter; 5 unit/lanes; 64 architectural). Two real fixes (T003 git update-index --refresh after post-merge checkout in merge.py; T006 new lane_env helper wired into LaneWorkspaceResult.lane_test_env via implement_support.py) and four pinned regressions (T001/T002/T004/T005) with assertions tied to the actual contracts (planning-lane WPs included in wp_order; resume idempotence + lane/WP-skip; untracked-tolerance with negative case for tracked changes; same-lane dependent-WP placement with no cross-lane edges). Out-of-scope edits limited to merge.py call site for T003 and one doc paragraph in docs/explanation/execution-lanes.md; both justified and noted. (--force used: blocker was a gitignored dossier snapshot artifact, not real uncommitted owned files.)

WP02 ready for review: T007 escape_for_comment helper wired into mission_brief; T008 assert_under_root with strict resolve + symlink guard; T009 size cap via os.stat pre-open + read_stdin_capped(cap+1) for STDIN; T010 atomic_write_bytes (open+fsync+replace) with 100-trial fork-SIGKILL harness proving 0 partial files; T011 IntakeFileMissingError vs IntakeFileUnreadableError distinction with cause-chain preservation; T012 root-consistency validation in write_brief_atomic raising IntakeRootInconsistentError before any I/O.

Review passed: 6/6 subtasks fixed. Tests green (30 unit/intake + 12 integration intake + 5 resilient_write retarget; 108 broader intake/mission_brief regression check). Helpers wired into live write path via mission_brief.write_mission_brief (escape_for_comment + atomic_write_text). Kill-9 harness uses os.fork() + os.kill(SIGKILL) over 100 trials with sanity check on both outcomes; peak-RSS asserted with resource.getrusage and platform normalization. Root consistency raises before any I/O. Out-of-scope edit limited to test_mission_brief_resilient_write retargeting Path.write_text patch to os.replace patch (precedent matches WP01).
